attributes.description: Alerts when host memory utilisation exceeds 85%. Above 85% risks ballooning and swapping on VMs.
attributes.name: [vSphere OTel] Host memory utilization high

investigation_guide.blob:
## vSphere host memory utilization high

### What fired
`vcenter.host.memory.utilization > 85%` during the window.

### Why it matters
Above ~85% memory, ESXi starts reclaiming from VMs — ballooning, compression, eventually swapping. Performance collapses at high utilisation.

### Triage
1. Correlate with VM ballooning / swapping metrics.

### Remediation
- Migrate VMs.
- Add hosts.

### Tuning
- 85% threshold; 90% for tolerant environments.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
// Host memory utilization: healthy <85%; unhealthy >90%
// Adjust threshold (e.g. 85 or 90) to suit environment
| WHERE vcenter.host.memory.utilization IS NOT NULL AND vcenter.host.memory.utilization > 85
| STATS utilization_pct = MAX(vcenter.host.memory.utilization) BY vcenter.datacenter.name, vcenter.cluster.name, vcenter.host.name
| SORT utilization_pct DESC
| LIMIT 20
